flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Champlain College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 2.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Champlain College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.0k → $47.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Champlain College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.0k → $47.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Champlain College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
